text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tokai Teio suffers an injury during training and I
take her to the infirmary.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: I said I'm fine! You're worrying over nothing!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
This thing will heal up in no time! I'll be back in
action tomorrow!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: I don't wanna.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I won't let this slow me down! If I say I can do it,
then―

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Ouch!
choice_data_list: You really think you can run in this state?
You really think you can run in this state?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Ouch!
choice_data_list: You really think you can run in this state?
You really think you can run in this state?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: ...Hmph.
choice_data_list: At least take it easy for today.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: ...Fine, but only today.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Sniffle... And only because you asked me.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: I won't let something dumb like an injury stop me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I make sure Tokai Teio takes a proper rest today.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: I can! I know I can!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: See?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: OW!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
choice_data_list: As long as you rest for today, it'll heal.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: ...Fine.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tokai Teio spends the entire day in a very grumpy
mood.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Look, Trainer! I'm fine!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: I'm the invincible Tokai Teio, remember?!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: You're my trainer! You need to believe in me!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
No matter how many times I fall, I always get
right back up!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The following day, Teio shows up to practice
looking even more formidable than before.
